evals.prompt: Add a Note entity to the database. It should have a required Title (string) and an optional Body (string?) property.
evals.expected_output: Domain entity Note.cs created, EF configuration NoteConfiguration.cs created, DbSet<Note> Notes added to DeskWatchDbContext, INoteRepository interface created, NoteRepository implementation created, AddScoped registration added in ServiceCollectionExtensions, dotnet build passes.
expectations: Domain entity has int Id property
Domain entity has no EF Core data annotations
Using directives are outside (before) namespace in entity file

evals.prompt: I want to track work sessions in the app. Scaffold a TimerEntry entity with a required Description (string), a StartedAt (DateTimeOffset), and an optional EndedAt (DateTimeOffset?).
evals.expected_output: Domain entity TimerEntry.cs created, EF configuration TimerEntryConfiguration.cs created, DbSet<TimerEntry> TimerEntries added to DeskWatchDbContext, ITimerEntryRepository interface created, TimerEntryRepository implementation created, AddScoped registration added in ServiceCollectionExtensions, dotnet build passes.
expectations: Domain entity has int Id property
Domain entity has no EF Core data annotations
Using directives are outside (before) namespace in entity file

evals.prompt: Create a Tag entity with a single required Name property (string, max 50 chars) and an IsActive bool.
evals.expected_output: Domain entity Tag.cs created, EF configuration TagConfiguration.cs with HasMaxLength(50) on Name, DbSet<Tag> Tags added to DeskWatchDbContext, ITagRepository interface created, TagRepository implementation created, AddScoped registration added in ServiceCollectionExtensions, dotnet build passes.
expectations: Domain entity has int Id property
Domain entity has no EF Core data annotations
Using directives are outside (before) namespace in entity file
EF configuration uses HasMaxLength(50) on Name
